title.en: S1G elements: sub-1-GHz long-range / low-power IoT signalling
title.zh: S1G 元素：Sub-1-GHz 远距离低功耗物联网信令

blocks.en: Drop Wi-Fi below 1 GHz and the world changes. The 802.11ah ("HaLow") radio trades megahertz for kilometres: channels as narrow as 1 MHz, signals that punch through walls, and a single AP expected to feed thousands of battery-powered sensors that sleep most of their lives. Tiny bandwidth plus huge, sleepy populations forces a redesign of how the AP advertises itself and schedules airtime. The S1G element family (Element IDs 207-236, clause 9.4.2.189 onward) is that redesign — a toolbox of compact information elements, each doing one job: advertise capabilities, slice up paging, sectorize antennas, hop through relays, and let stations sleep on a schedule.
blocks.zh: 把 Wi-Fi 搬到 1 GHz 以下，世界就变了。802.11ah（即“HaLow”）用兆赫兹换取公里级覆盖：信道窄至 1 MHz、信号能穿墙，而且要求单个 AP 喂饱数以千计、几乎一直在休眠的电池供电传感器。极小的带宽加上庞大而嗜睡的设备群，迫使我们重新设计 AP 如何宣告自身、如何调度空口时间。S1G 元素家族（元素 ID 207–236，自 9.4.2.189 起）正是这套重新设计——一个紧凑信息元素工具箱，每个元素只做一件事：宣告能力、切分寻呼、扇区化天线、经中继转发、让站点按计划休眠。

blocks.en: Start with the two that define the BSS. S1G Capabilities (9.4.2.199, ID 217) is the radio's resume — it advertises which S1G features a STA or AP supports. S1G Operation (9.4.2.211, ID 232) is the rulebook the AP broadcasts to control how S1G STAs operate in the BSS (channel, width, basic rates). Around them sit the open-loop helpers: the S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index element (9.4.2.189, ID 207) carries a one-octet index D so a receiver can compute link margin (-128 + D x 0.5 dB) over MCS 10 without a closed-loop exchange, enabling open-loop rate and power control.
blocks.zh: 先看定义 BSS 的两个元素。S1G Capabilities（9.4.2.199，ID 217）是这部电台的“简历”——宣告某个 STA 或 AP 支持哪些 S1G 特性。S1G Operation（9.4.2.211，ID 232）则是 AP 广播出来的“规则手册”，用以控制 S1G STA 在 BSS 中如何运作（信道、带宽、基本速率）。围绕它们的是开环辅助元素：S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index 元素（9.4.2.189，ID 207）携带一个单字节索引 D，让接收方无需闭环交互即可算出相对 MCS 10 的链路余量（-128 + D x 0.5 dB），从而实现开环速率与功率控制。

blocks.en: S1G beacons come in flavours. To keep airtime cheap, an AP can send a Short Beacon. The S1G Beacon Compatibility element (9.4.2.195, ID 213) carries beacon-interval/timing info so a STA hearing a short beacon stays in sync; the Short Beacon Interval element (9.4.2.196, ID 214) states the short-beacon period; and the Change Sequence element (9.4.2.197, ID 215) is a single counter that ticks whenever critical system info changes — if it hasn't moved, a STA can skip re-reading the full beacon and stay asleep.
blocks.zh: S1G 信标有多种形态。为了节省空口开销，AP 可以发送 Short Beacon（短信标）。S1G Beacon Compatibility 元素（9.4.2.195，ID 213）携带信标间隔/定时信息，让收到短信标的 STA 保持同步；Short Beacon Interval 元素（9.4.2.196，ID 214）给出短信标周期；Change Sequence 元素（9.4.2.197，ID 215）则是一个计数器，每当关键系统信息变化时就递增——若它没动，STA 就能跳过重新读取完整信标，继续休眠。

blocks.en: The heart of S1G is paging — how an AP tells thousands of dozing STAs whether they have traffic, without keeping them all awake. The RPS element (9.4.2.190, ID 208) carries one or more RAW Assignment subfields that define Restricted Access Windows, slicing time so only a named group of STAs may contend in each window. The Page Slice element (9.4.2.191, ID 209) splits a paging "page" into slices served across beacon intervals, so a STA only wakes for its slice. To get an AID in the first place a STA sends an AID Request element (9.4.2.192, ID 210) describing its device characteristics, and the AP replies with an AID Response element (9.4.2.193, ID 211) granting an (individual or group) AID; the AID Announcement element (9.4.2.207, ID 228) publishes the MAC-address-to-AID mapping table.
blocks.zh: S1G 的核心是寻呼——AP 如何在不让成千上万休眠 STA 都保持唤醒的前提下，告诉它们是否有数据等待。RPS 元素（9.4.2.190，ID 208）携带一个或多个 RAW Assignment 子字段，定义“受限访问窗口”（RAW），把时间切分开，使每个窗口内只有指定的一组 STA 可以竞争。Page Slice 元素（9.4.2.191，ID 209）把一个寻呼“页”切成若干切片，分散到多个信标间隔中服务，于是 STA 只需为自己的切片唤醒。要先拿到 AID，STA 发送 AID Request 元素（9.4.2.192，ID 210）描述设备特征，AP 用 AID Response 元素（9.4.2.193，ID 211）回复，授予一个（独立或分组）AID；AID Announcement 元素（9.4.2.207，ID 228）则公布 MAC 地址到 AID 的映射表。

blocks.en: Sub-GHz APs also steer energy in space and stretch range with relays. Sectorization uses directional antenna sectors: the S1G Sector Operation element (9.4.2.194, ID 212) tells a STA which sector to use and when, and the Sectorized Group ID List element (9.4.2.210, ID 231) maps groups of STAs to sectors. When a STA is too far to hear the AP directly, relays bridge the gap: the S1G Relay element (9.4.2.203, ID 224) advertises relay parameters, the S1G Relay Discovery element (9.4.2.206, ID 226) lets STAs find a relay, the S1G Relay Activation element (9.4.2.205, ID 236) turns the relay link on (its Direction subfield marks AP-vs-STA origin), and the Reachable Address element (9.4.2.204, ID 225) lists the MAC addresses reachable through that relay.
blocks.zh: Sub-GHz 的 AP 还会在空间上引导能量、用中继延伸覆盖。扇区化使用定向天线扇区：S1G Sector Operation 元素（9.4.2.194，ID 212）告诉 STA 该用哪个扇区、在何时使用，Sectorized Group ID List 元素（9.4.2.210，ID 231）把成组的 STA 映射到各扇区。当某个 STA 太远、听不到 AP 时，由中继来弥合：S1G Relay 元素（9.4.2.203，ID 224）宣告中继参数，S1G Relay Discovery 元素（9.4.2.206，ID 226）让 STA 发现中继，S1G Relay Activation 元素（9.4.2.205，ID 236）开启中继链路（其 Direction 子字段标记发送方是 AP 还是 STA），Reachable Address 元素（9.4.2.204，ID 225）列出可经该中继到达的 MAC 地址。

blocks.en: The rest of the toolbox squeezes power and bytes. TWT (9.4.2.198, ID 216) negotiates Target Wake Times so a STA sleeps until an agreed slot. Header Compression (9.4.2.212, ID 233) tells the peer to omit repeated header fields (e.g. a stored A4 address). SST (9.4.2.200, ID 220) and SST Operation (9.4.2.213, ID 234) drive Subchannel Selective Transmission, picking which narrow subchannel to use. EL Operation (9.4.2.209, ID 230) advertises Extended-range Long (1 MHz) PPDU operation. PV1 Probe Response Option (9.4.2.208, ID 229) requests the compact PV1 probe response. TSF Timer Accuracy (9.4.2.202, ID 223) states how accurate the transmitter's clock is. And MAD (9.4.2.214, ID 235) carries the Maximum Away Duration, bounding how long a STA may be off-channel.
blocks.zh: 工具箱里的其余元素则在挤压功耗与字节。TWT（9.4.2.198，ID 216）协商“目标唤醒时间”，让 STA 休眠到约定时隙再醒。Header Compression（9.4.2.212，ID 233）告诉对端省略重复的帧头字段（如已存储的 A4 地址）。SST（9.4.2.200，ID 220）与 SST Operation（9.4.2.213，ID 234）驱动“子信道选择性传输”，挑选使用哪个窄子信道。EL Operation（9.4.2.209，ID 230）宣告“扩展远距长（1 MHz）PPDU”操作。PV1 Probe Response Option（9.4.2.208，ID 229）请求紧凑的 PV1 探测响应。TSF Timer Accuracy（9.4.2.202，ID 223）说明发送方时钟的精度。MAD（9.4.2.214，ID 235）携带“最大离开时长”，限定 STA 可离开信道多久。

summary.en: Inside the RPS element and the open-loop link margin maths
summary.zh: 深入 RPS 元素与开环链路余量计算

blocks.en: The RPS element (9.4.2.190) is the scheduler's workhorse: its RAW Assignments field holds one or more RAW Assignment subfields, each beginning with a 1-octet RAW Control subfield. RAW Control packs a 2-bit RAW Type (Generic, Sounding, Simplex, Triggering-frame), a 2-bit RAW Type Options, and presence bits (Start Time Indication, RAW Group Indication, Channel Indication Presence, Periodic RAW Indication). The RAW Slot Definition computes slot duration as DSLOT = 500 + CSLOT x 120 microseconds, and the RAW duration as DRAW = DSLOT x NRAW; the optional RAW Group subfield names the AID range (Page Index + RAW Start AID + RAW End AID) allowed to contend. Separately, the S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index element (9.4.2.189) carries an unsigned index D so that the open-loop link margin is computed as DeltaOPLM = (-128 + D x 0.5) dB relative to MCS 10 in a 1 MHz channel (D=0 -> -128 dB, D=255 -> -0.5 dB), letting a receiver derive its SNR margin without a closed-loop sounding exchange.
blocks.zh: RPS 元素（9.4.2.190）是调度器的主力：其 RAW Assignments 字段容纳一个或多个 RAW Assignment 子字段，每个都以 1 字节的 RAW Control 子字段开头。RAW Control 打包了 2 比特 RAW Type（Generic、Sounding、Simplex、Triggering-frame）、2 比特 RAW Type Options，以及若干存在性比特（Start Time Indication、RAW Group Indication、Channel Indication Presence、Periodic RAW Indication）。RAW Slot Definition 计算时隙时长 DSLOT = 500 + CSLOT x 120 微秒，RAW 时长 DRAW = DSLOT x NRAW；可选的 RAW Group 子字段指定允许竞争的 AID 范围（Page Index + RAW Start AID + RAW End AID）。另外，S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index 元素（9.4.2.189）携带无符号索引 D，使开环链路余量按 DeltaOPLM = (-128 + D x 0.5) dB 计算，相对于 1 MHz 信道中的 MCS 10（D=0 对应 -128 dB，D=255 对应 -0.5 dB），让接收方无需闭环探测交互即可推导自身 SNR 余量。

cites.note: 9.4.2.189 S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index element; 9.4.2.190 RPS element intro
